mapper.insert: insert into dish (name, category_id, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{name}, #{categoryId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.select:
select d.*,c.name as Category_name from dish d join category c on d.category_id = c.id
and d.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and d.category_id like concat('%',#{categoryId},'%')
and d.status like concat('%',#{status},'%')
order by create_time desc
mapper.update:
update dish
name = #{name},
status = #{status},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
id = #{id}
